function: () => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); const readout = document.getElementById('draw-strength-readout'); const sortGuide = document.getElementById('sort-guide'); const copyBtn = document.getElementById('btn-lorax-test-copy'); const cardContainer = document.querySelector('.app-container[data-card-order-key]'); const profilesGrid = document.getElementById('profiles-grid'); const moodWrap = document.getElementById('mood-colors'); const sortAnnounce = document.getElementById('sort-announce'); return { panel: !!panel, panelRole: panel?.getAttribute('role'), panelAriaNow: panel?.getAttribute('aria-valuenow'), readout: !!readout, readoutText: readout?.textContent, sortGuide: !!sortGuide, sortGuideVisible: sortGuide && !sortGuide.classList.contains('is-hidden'), copyBtn: !!copyBtn, copyBtnHidden: copyBtn?.classList.contains('hidden'), cardContainer: !!cardContainer, profilesGrid: !!profilesGrid, moodWrap: !!moodWrap, sortAnnounce: !!sortAnnounce, cardSortableWired: !!cardContainer?.__sortableCardInstance, profileSortableWired: !!profilesGrid?.__sortableProfileInstance, moodSortableWired: !!moodWrap?.__sortableMoodInstance, sortableCardCount: cardContainer?.querySelectorAll('[data-card-id]').length }; }
